title: Additional penalties
doc_html:
§980. Additional penalties

            Any penalty imposed for violation of this Part shall be in addition to, and not in lieu of, any civil or administrative penalty or sanction authorized by law.

            Added by Acts 1972, No. 634, §1; Acts 2018, No. 206, §4.
doc_text:
§980.  Additional penalties
Any penalty imposed for violation of this Part shall be in addition to, and not in lieu
of, any civil or administrative penalty or sanction authorized by law.
Added by Acts 1972, No. 634, §1; Acts 2018, No. 206, §4.
